items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布声明：美国政府发布出口管制指令，要求暂停对 Fable 5 和 Mythos 5 的全部访问。已在用 Fable 5 / Mythos 5 的工程必须立即将 model 字段切回 Claude Opus 4.8 或 Sonnet 系列，否则调用会直接失败并返回 access denied 类错误。
items.backend_focus: 立即行动：把 model=fable-5 / model=mythos-5 的所有调用替换为 claude-opus-4-8 或当前可用版本；清理代码库中残留的 5 系列引用，关注 Anthropic 官方 deprecation 与区域可用性公告。

items.original_summary: nefits of AI to communities across America. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Product  Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger perform...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 推出 Claude Corps 国家奖学金项目，面向早期职业人群推广 AI 社区应用，并发布 AI 政策建议。这是公益与政策类公告，与 API/SDK/模型版本完全无关，开发者无任何迁移事项。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。本条为人才项目与政策倡议，工程团队无 API、SDK 或配置需要更新。

items.title: Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements   Product  Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of m...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 将 Project Glasswing 扩展到 15+ 国家的约 150 个新组织。这是企业合作/渠道扩展公告，API、SDK、模型版本与限流策略均无变化，开发者集成完全不受影响。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。本条为合作范围公告，工程团队无任何代码、配置或 SDK 版本需要调整。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approx...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8，定位 Opus 系列升级版，在 coding、agentic 任务和专业工作负载上表现更强，延续 200K 上下文窗口与 Tool Use / MCP 能力。调用方可在 model 字段填 claude-opus-4-8 启用，老的 Opus 4.x 调用完全兼容，建议在 agent 链路和高复杂度推理场景做 A/B 评估后再全面切换。
items.backend_focus: 建议升级：把高复杂度 agent / coding 场景的 model 字段切到 claude-opus-4-8，关注 Anthropic 公布的新价格、max_tokens、context window 数值；留意旧版 Opus 的 deprecation 时间线，保留 4.x 备选以防回滚。

We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approx...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 联合创始人 Chris Olah 就教皇利奥十四世通谕《Magnifica humanitas》发表公开评论。这是一条品牌/伦理表态，不涉及产品、API、SDK 或模型版本变更。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。本条为高层公开评论，与工程集成完全无关。

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 宣布首尔办公室开业并与韩国 AI 生态多家机构建立新合作伙伴关系。这是区域市场与商务拓展公告，不涉及 API、SDK、限流或区域可用性变化，开发者侧无迁移事项。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。本条为商务/区域公告，工程团队无任何配置或代码需要更新。

items.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 公布首个 Anthropic Public Record 的结果。这是透明度报告类公告，不涉及 API、SDK、模型参数或限流策略变化，开发者集成完全不受影响。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。本条为透明度披露，工程团队无任何技术项需要跟进。

items.title: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 与 TCS 达成合作，将 Claude 引入受监管行业。这是企业渠道合作公告，不涉及 API、SDK、模型版本或限流变化，开发者集成完全不受影响。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。本条为合作签约公告，工程团队无需调整任何代码或配置。

items.title: DXC will integrate Claude into the systems banks, airlines, and other regulated industries rely on
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 与 DXC 达成联盟，将 Claude 集成到银行、航空及其他受监管行业依赖的核心系统。这是企业销售/合作公告，API、SDK、模型版本与限流无变化，开发者侧无迁移事项。
items.backend_focus: 营销大于实质，无需行动。本条为客户/合作公告，工程团队无任何 API 升级或 deprecation 需要处理。
